pattern: Track the running deficit of unmatched closing brackets; the answer is the ceiling of the maximum deficit over two.
hints: Cancel each closing bracket against an earlier unmatched opener; what is left is a count of stranded closers.
One swap fixes two stranded closing brackets, so the answer grows with how deep the imbalance gets.
Scan left to right keeping a balance counter; the maximum number of unmatched closers seen, halved and rounded up, is the minimum swaps.

stress.description: balanced-count random strings with equal openers and closers shuffled
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(size, 500000))
    chars = ['['] * n + [']'] * n
    rng.shuffle(chars)
    return [''.join(chars)]
stress.note: guarantees equal bracket counts as required
